sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109385" key="u(po/topos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπότοπ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n109385.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">suspicious,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1617.tlg001:37" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Polem.Phgn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">37</biblScope> </bibl> (sed leg. <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">καχύποπτοι</foreign>).</sense> </entryFree>
